steps.title: Identify intersection points on the graph
steps.content: The graph shows a downward-opening parabola and a horizontal line at $y = 6$. Solutions to the system are the points where these curves meet.

steps.title: Read x-coordinates from the grid
steps.content:
The parabola crosses the line $y = 6$ at two points. Reading from the grid lines:
  • Left intersection: $x = 4$
  • Right intersection: $x \approx 6$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The left intersection point is $(4, 6)$, so $x = 4$ is a solution to the system. This matches choice A — A is correct.
